spec_match.rationale: The page demonstrates AccentColor and AccentColorText across component backgrounds, borders, focus rings, links, progress bars, and native accent-color form controls.

interactive.rationale: Preset swatches, the custom color picker, tabs, toggles, form controls, and live runtime context all update visible UI state.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept still delivers the promised component gallery and now includes the native form-control use case from the critique.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now probes CSS keyword support, installed-PWA display mode, and forced-colors state so the gated/fallback behavior is visible.

references.rationale: The references section includes chromestatus.com/feature/5068127364186112 and the CSS Color 4 system colors spec link.

design_system.rationale: The soft badge now mixes against var(--bg-paper), and the simulated palette is derived from design-system CSS variables instead of literal authored color values.

summary: The UI Components demo now includes native accent-color controls, runtime context probes, design-system-safe soft badges, and the required references, with no remaining open findings.
